The NOURIÉ Concept

Built for the spaces your people spend 40 hours a week in.

Your office, clinic, gym, or building says something about who you are. A generic vending machine in the corner says the wrong thing. NOURIÉ says you care about every detail — the coffee, the snacks, the experience of being here.

🌿
Premium
Recognizable wellness brands. Never generic items.
✦
Minimal
Design that complements your space, not fights it.
🏨
Hospitality
Managed weekly. Zero operational burden on you.
💰
Revenue
Earn a passive monthly share from every sale.
The NOURIÉ Station

Not a machine. A brand touchpoint.

Every NOURIÉ unit is a Vendify Model 1.0 — 60 slots, touchscreen, refrigerated, anti-fog double-pane glass. Custom wrapped in your brand. Impossible to overlook.

Vendify Model 1.0

Custom-wrapped to match your aesthetic.

The machine is wrapped in your brand colors, logo, and design language. It doesn't look like a vending machine — it looks like it was always meant to be there.

The Process

Zero cost. Zero effort. Just results.

01
🔍
Discovery
We visit your space, assess foot traffic and placement, and recommend the perfect NOURIÉ configuration. 20 minutes. Zero obligation.
02
🎨
Design & Wrap
Custom machine wrap matching your brand. You approve the design and product mix before anything ships or installs.
03
⚡
Install & Launch
We deliver, install, and fully stock your station. Cashless system activated. Under 2 hours total. Your 30-day trial begins.
04
💰
Restock & Earn
NOURIÉ manages all restocking and maintenance weekly. Your revenue share deposits monthly by the 15th — automatically.

Why Partner

The business case
for your space.

❤️
Enhanced Guest Experience
A curated NOURIÉ station signals you care about every detail. A premium brand touchpoint, not a convenience item.
💰
Passive Revenue Stream
Earn a percentage of every sale deposited monthly. Your station justifies its floor space from day one.
⚡
Zero Operational Burden
Installation, restocking, maintenance, payments — NOURIÉ handles everything. You never touch the station.
✦
Premium Curation
Recognizable wellness and gourmet brands — never generic inventory. Every product is intentional.
🎨
Custom Brand Integration
Wrapped in your colors and aesthetic. The station becomes part of your space's visual identity.
🛡️
No Cost. No Risk.
30-day free trial. If it's not the right fit, we remove it. No questions, no fees, no awkward conversations.
Why We're Different

What competitors can't copy.

Think Whole Foods + Equinox + Apple Store — in vending form. These five pillars are why no traditional vending company can replicate the NOURIÉ experience quickly.

01
Beauty in Vending
Kiehl's, Tarte, Touchland, Kitsch — prestige beauty at vending price points. No competitor carries this. It creates immediate word-of-mouth.
02
Collagen Drinks
Vital Proteins Collagen Water and Liquid Youth Sparkling Collagen — exclusively NOURIÉ in this market. Massive Sephora/Ulta audience recognition.
03
Non-Alc Trend
Kin Euphorics, Hiyo — targeting the sober-curious demographic in corporate offices and luxury apartments. No vending service is serving this.
04
The $8+ SKU
Intentional high-AOV items: Kiehl's, Anker cables, Compartes chocolate. One cable sale = three soda sales. Most operators cap at $4.
05
Boutique Feel
Merchandised like a luxury retail display — not restocked like a route. Products are always faced. Labels always visible. Never neglected.

Questions

Frequently asked questions.

Is there really no cost to my business?+
Correct. NOURIÉ provides the station, installation, product stocking, weekly restocking, and full maintenance at no charge. We earn revenue from product sales and share a percentage with you monthly.
How is the revenue share calculated?+
Revenue share is calculated as a percentage of total net sales each calendar month. Payments are issued monthly via ACH or check with a detailed statement by the 15th.
What happens after the 30-day free trial?+
After the trial we review performance together. If it's not working, we remove the station at no cost. If it's working, we continue under standard 90-day terms.
How much floor space does the station require?+
Standard footprint is approximately 24" wide × 30" deep — smaller than most office printers. Alternative placements can be discussed during the discovery visit.
Can I choose which products go in my station?+
Yes. Curation is collaborative. During the discovery visit we learn about your clientele and propose a product mix — you have approval before installation.
Do I need to do anything after installation?+
Nothing. NOURIÉ handles all restocking and maintenance weekly. Contact your account manager if anything needs attention between visits.

Ready to partner?

Our Story

The NOURIÉ Concept

Born from the belief that every great space deserves amenities that match its standard.

Why We Built This

Wellness-forward convenience
for modern spaces.

Some ideas begin with a problem. NOURIÉ began with a feeling — walking into a beautiful, carefully designed space and encountering a vending machine in the corner. Loud branding. Generic products. A machine that communicated the opposite of everything the business had worked to build.

NOURIÉ was created to solve that disconnect. We believe every great space deserves amenities that match its standard — not generic convenience, not an afterthought. A curated, beautifully designed self-service experience that feels like it was always meant to be there.

We are not in the vending business. We are in the business of elevating spaces.

Premium
We source exclusively from wellness and gourmet brands clients recognize and trust. Every item is intentional.
Minimal
Our station design and operational model are built around simplicity. Visually clean. Quietly functional.
Hospitality
We approach every partnership the way a boutique hotel approaches its guest experience — with genuine care.
Our Parent Company
Hearthstone & Co. Workforce Solutions

NOURIÉ is a specialty program of Hearthstone & Co. Workforce Solutions, a credentialed healthcare staffing agency serving Greater Houston — a subsidiary of The Shiylohe Collective, a veteran-owned parent company.

The Shiylohe Collective
Veteran-owned.
Houston-based.

Built on the principle that business can be both principled and exceptional. NOURIÉ carries that standard into every space it serves.

Start Your Trial

Request a Station

No cost. No lease. No commitment. We'll reach out within 48 hours.

What to Expect
Step One
Submit your request. Our team reviews every submission personally.
Step Two
We call within 48 hours to schedule a 20-minute discovery visit.
Step Three
We assess your space and present a custom station proposal.
Step Four
Installation at your convenience. Your 30-day trial begins on install day.
Our Promise
No obligation after your free trial. If NOURIÉ isn't the right fit, we remove the station — no questions, no charges, no awkward conversations.

No cost. No commitment. We respond within 24 hours. By submitting you agree to be contacted by our team.

✦  Thank you — your request has been received. Our team will be in touch within 48 hours.
